# Explainability Report MCP

> By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok

`explainability-report-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install explainability-report-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx explainability-report-mcp
```

## Tools

- `quick_scan` — Describe an AI system -> instant transparency and explainability assessment. No API key required.
- `generate_model_card` — Generate an EU AI Act compliant model card with structured transparency information.
- `explain_decision` — Generate a human-readable explanation of an AI decision.
- `transparency_audit` — Assess an AI system against EU AI Act Article 13 transparency requirements.
- `create_impact_assessment` — Generate a DPIA/AIIA (AI Impact Assessment) template for an AI system.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/explainability-report-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/explainability-report-mcp/
